popup.title: This is a portfolio sample site.
body: This site is a frontend portfolio project by Emre Can Karataş. Op. Dr. Kaan Işık is a fictional persona; no information, statistic or identity on this site belongs to a real medical professional.
Form submissions, like counts and view metrics are visual only — there is no backend.
